label: 4251 to 4261 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 97–258, § 5(b)96 Stat. 1068Sept. 13, 1982
notes: Section 4251, , , , set out Congressional statement of purpose. See , Money and Finance.Pub. L. 93–510, § 288 Stat. 1604section 7101 of Title 31Dec. 5, 1974
Section 4252, , , , related to implementation of joint funding provisions by Federal officials. See .Pub. L. 93–510, § 388 Stat. 1604section 7103 of Title 31Dec. 5, 1974

Section 4253, , , , related to activities by heads of Federal agencies relating to application processing or assistance requests under two or more Federal programs supporting any project. See .Pub. L. 93–510, § 488 Stat. 1605section 7104 of Title 31Dec. 5, 1974

Section 4254, , , , related to special authorities of heads of Federal agencies with respect to projects assisted under more than one Federal assistance program and exercise of these authorities pursuant to regulations prescribed by President. See .Pub. L. 93–510, § 588 Stat. 1605section 7108 of Title 31Dec. 5, 1974

Section 4255, , , , provided for establishment by heads of Federal agencies of uniform technical and administrative provisions. See .Pub. L. 93–510, § 688 Stat. 1606section 7105 of Title 31Dec. 5, 1974

Section 4256, , , , related to delegation by Federal agency heads of powers and functions relating to supervision, etc., of Federal assistance with the approval of President. See .Pub. L. 93–510, § 788 Stat. 1606section 7106 of Title 31Dec. 5, 1974
Section 4257, , , , provided for a joint management fund for financing of projects under this chapter. See .Pub. L. 93–510, § 888 Stat. 1606section 7107 of Title 31Dec. 5, 1974
Section 4258, , , , related to availability of appropriations for joint funding of programs under this chapter. See .Pub. L. 93–510, § 988 Stat. 1607section 7109 of Title 31Dec. 5, 1974

Section 4259, , , , provided for agreements between Federal agencies and States extending joint funding provisions to assisted projects subject to Presidential regulations. See .Pub. L. 93–510, § 1088 Stat. 1607section 7110 of Title 31Dec. 5, 1974

Section 4260, , , , provided for a report by the President to Congress concerning actions taken under this chapter and the contents of such report. See .Pub. L. 93–510, § 1188 Stat. 1608section 7111 of Title 31Dec. 5, 1974
Section 4261, , , , provided definitions for use in this chapter. See .Pub. L. 93–510, § 1288 Stat. 1608section 7102 of Title 31Dec. 5, 1974

Effective and Expiration Dates, , , as amended by , , , which provided for the effective and expiration dates of that Act, was repealed by , , . See , Money and Finance.Pub.
